title: Contact and Campuses
content:
Contact

Contact and Campuses

Dogus brand means half a century dedicated to education. Dogus University, which is  the owner of the firsts in education and the pioneer of innovations, educates the future with the power it derives from its past.

Doğuş University, which was founded on July 9th ,1997 with the Law No.4281 adopted at the National Assembly of Turkey due to the success of  Dogus Education Foundation founded in 1995,  is a non-profit foundation university with a public legal title.

Doğuş University, which achieved a successful position in higher education in a short time with a rapid academic progress, is in all levels of higher  education with its 31 degree programs in 5 faculties, 18 Associate Programs in Vocational School, 17 Master’s and 7 Doctorate programmes in 2 institutions.

Dogus University, which prioritizes offering qualified education with its outstanding academic staff and equipping students with knowledge while contributing to the world of science, has been getting ahead since 1997 without leaving this goal.

Doğuş University, which ensures academic quality and increases its success  continuously,  ranks among the best in neutral rankings made by different sources. The two most important examples are Web Of Science datas and URAP reports. Those examples show that Dogus University is one of the best 2 thousand universities in the world and among the top 3 foundation universities in İstanbul (except medical faculty). Dogus University graduates, who continue their academic career or work life successfully in Turkey or abroad and pioneer in their field, are seen as the sign of success.
